underlying_goal: Evaluate and improve the discoverability of the pi-subagents extension in the system configuration, then align all skills/prompts with the actual 3 subagents (scout, researcher, worker) by removing references to non-existent agents.
friction_detail: Assistant initially spawned a subagent to analyze broadly instead of focusing on the user's request to identify and fix references to non-existent subagents.
brief_summary: User wanted analysis and improvement of pi-subagents discoverability, then asked for alignment of all skills/prompts to only reference the 3 existing subagents (scout, researcher, worker) – both goals were achieved through multiple edits.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Focus questions to the user instead of broadly analyzing – prefer asking the user directly
Only 3 agents exist: scout, worker, and researcher – remove references to any others
